thoughts: User wants me to load the 'jira' skill using skills_tool, then wait for it to complete (5-15 min), and finally send a notification when done.

After loading, I need to monitor completion. The tool should handle the 5-15 minute wait internally.
Once complete, I'll load 'notify-user' skill and send the success message.
If there's failure, I'll use notify-user with priority 4.
